title: movie CHICKEN JOCKEY
description: makes the chicken, zombie and baby zombie look like their versions from the movie
body:
Level 50 : Grandmaster Miner
117
(REQUIRES OPTIFINE)

CHICKEN JOCKEY

This resource pack makes the zombie, baby zombie, and chicken look more like they do in the movie.

Yeah, it’s weird—but I still wanted to make this pack, lol.
